(define (problem blocksworld-swap-towers)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13)
  (:init
    (arm-empty)
    (on-table b1)
    (on b2 b1)
    (on b3 b2)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (clear b10)
    (on-table b11)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (clear b13)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      (on-table b1)
      (on b2 b11)
      (on b3 b2)
      (on b4 b3)
      (on b5 b4)
      (on b6 b5)

      (on b10 b9)
      (clear b10)
      (on-table b11)
      (on b12 b1)
      (on b13 b12)
      (clear b13)
    )
  )
)
